sql.query: SELECT id, contactType, organisationName, firstName, lastName, displayName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', firstName, lastName)), ''), NULLIF(displayName, ''), NULLIF(organisationName, ''), 'Unnamed contact') AS contactName, email, phone, city, country, isActive, createdDate, modifiedDate FROM tbl_contacts WHERE tenantId = :tenantId ORDER BY contactName, organisationName
